name: portfolio-context
description: Auto-loaded context for Portfolio Buddy 2 development. Use for ANY task involving: React 19 development, TypeScript, portfolio analysis features, metrics calculations, trading strategy comparison, or working with the Portfolio Buddy 2 codebase. Contains tech stack, known issues, and architectural constraints.
capabilities: Provides complete tech stack for Portfolio Buddy 2
Documents known bugs and tech debt items
Describes component architecture and file structure
Lists architectural constraints and coding standards
Contains migration progress from legacy app
author: 5MinFutures
securitySummary: This skill is a pure documentation/context file containing no executable code. All 22 static findings are FALSE POSITIVES caused by the analyzer misinterpreting JSON metadata fields, markdown code fences, and documentation text as security threats. The skill-report.json was previously audited as safe with the same conclusion. No network calls, file access, or command execution capabilities exist.
valueStatement: Accelerate Portfolio Buddy 2 development with instant access to tech stack, architecture, known issues, and component patterns. This context skill helps AI assistants deliver accurate, project-aware responses.
limitations: Does not execute code or perform calculations
Does not access external APIs or databases
Does not modify or create project files

useCases.title: New developer onboarding
useCases.description: Get instant understanding of project architecture, patterns, and coding standards when joining the team

useCases.title: Context-aware coding help
useCases.description: Receive project-specific guidance that respects existing architecture and avoids conflicting patterns

useCases.title: Quick reference for issues
useCases.description: Access documented bugs and tech debt items when debugging or planning refactoring work

promptTemplates.title: Quick start
promptTemplates.prompt: What tech stack does this project use and what is the main purpose?

promptTemplates.title: Component help
promptTemplates.prompt: Where is the correlation heatmap component and how does it work?

promptTemplates.title: Debug issue
promptTemplates.prompt: What known issues exist with Supabase uploads and how are they handled?

promptTemplates.title: Architecture review
promptTemplates.prompt: What are the component size limits and TypeScript rules for this project?

bestPractices: Load this skill first when working on Portfolio Buddy 2 tasks
Reference known issues before filing new bug reports
Follow documented component and hook patterns
Check tech debt items before adding new dependencies
antiPatterns: Adding Zustand or TanStack Query (state management already defined)
Creating components over 200 lines (violates project standards)
Using any types in TypeScript code (strict typing required)

faq.question: Is this skill compatible with other context skills?
faq.answer: Yes. This skill provides project-specific context and works alongside other general-purpose skills.

faq.question: What is the maximum component size allowed?
faq.answer: Components should not exceed 200 lines. Three components currently violate this as known tech debt.

faq.question: Does this skill connect to my database?
faq.answer: No. This skill only provides documentation context. It does not access any databases or APIs.

faq.question: Is my trade data safe when using this skill?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill contains no code that accesses files or data. It only provides static documentation.

faq.question: Why is my AI response not project-aware?
faq.answer: Ensure this skill is loaded before asking project-related questions. It provides the context needed.

faq.question: How does this compare to migration-tracker skill?
faq.answer: Portfolio-context covers current project state. Migration-tracker tracks progress migrating features from the legacy app.
